programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Teetering on the edge of sanity, volatile literary agent Peter Loew (Nicolas Cage) tries to find purpose in his life through a cutthroat work ethic and a hedonistic night life.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: Forget office politics, only the smartest will survive this bloody office outing.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic Part 3
programme.desc: Four players compete at the luxurious Bellagio for the more than $1.2 million top prize in the WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LA Poker Classic
programme.desc: Six players battle in Los Angeles for the more than $1 million first-place prize in the WPT LA Poker Classic.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT LA Poker Classic

programme.title: What?
programme.desc: During her Italian vacation, a young and beautiful American tourist finds herself as a guest in a coastal villa inhabited by some odd people.

programme.title: The Bees
programme.desc: When South American killer bees, corporately smuggled into the United States, mutates into intelligent insects and attacks helpless people, young scientist work desperately to end the threat as the menace swarms in on the city areas.

programme.title: But I'm a Cheerleader: But I'm a Cheerleader
programme.desc: A cheerleading-obsessed teenager is sent to a strict summer camp when her parents suspect her of being a lesbian.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: A fallen warrior rises against a corrupt and sadistic ruler to avenge his dishonored master. Starring: Clive Owen, Morgan Freeman, Aksel Hennie

programme.title: Ambushed
programme.desc: An agent (Dolph Lundgren) faces killers and crooked cops as he tries to rescue an undercover colleague (Carly Pope) from cocaine smugglers.

programme.title: The Passage
programme.desc: Enlisted by the French Resistance to transport a scientist and his family into Spain, a courageous Basque shepherd must guide the group safely across the dangerous Pyrenees...and elude the sadistic Nazi captain who is determined to capture them!

programme.title: Don't Say A Word
programme.desc: When Dr. Nathan Conrad's daughter is kidnapped, a secret held by one of his catatonic patients may be his only hope.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: Multi-award winning actor Brian Cox plays reclusive Avery Ludlow, a small-town shop owner whose only reason for living is his dog, Red.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent and his estranged daughter are forced on the run when his employers erase all records of his existence, and mark them both for termination as part of a wide-reaching international conspiracy.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: When a psychotic trucker takes offense at the pranks pulled by a couple of college students, the young kids are sucked into a whirlpool of terror.

programme.title: Red Plague
programme.desc: Journey through a world left to wind and rust, and find that home is always waiting no matter how long you've been away.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: The Titan
programme.desc: As Earth becomes inhabitable, the human race must find a new home. Hotshot Air Force pilot, Rick is chosen by the military to be made capable of surviving on a new planet.

programme.title: InControl
programme.desc: A group of students discover a device that allows them to control and experience the world through someone else’s eyes. As they push the machine to its limits, they realise they have been manipulated and descend into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Guinea
programme.desc: Crossing the mountainous forests is a real challenge and it is vital to stay careful as ravines are 700 meters deep.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Ladakh
programme.desc: Ladakh, the most northern state of India, is one of the harshest environments in the world.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Laos
programme.desc: Landlocked and shrouded in historical mystery, Laos is home to dozens of forgotten tribes who reside in its vast rolling mountains and impenetrable jungles.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Vietnam
programme.desc: We are in the Quan Hoa mountains in the Northwest of Vietnam. It is one of the poorest and most isolated regions in the country.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Camp
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Solid
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: The Breed
programme.desc: A group of five college kids are forced to match wits with unwelcoming residents when they fly to a "deserted" island for a party weekend.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: Chaos descends when a mysterious pulse turns cell phone users into vicious predators. Desperate to reunite with his family, Clay teams up with survivors to battle the hordes of relentless killers!

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side
programme.desc: Those ghastly ghosts return to battle once more with JoBeth Williams and Craig T. Nelson for the soul of a young clairvoyant.

programme.title: Christmas Child
programme.desc: A life-sized nativity leads a man to learn about his past and lost family.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she’s trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: All I Want For Christmas
programme.desc: One Christmas a boy wishes he could change places and his dream comes true! But he soon discovers that without his parents and friends it's actually a curse. The only problem is - can he reverse his disastrous wish and get his family back again.

programme.title: Anything But Christmas
programme.desc: Just days before Christmas, a Kentucky State Representative proposes a bill to change the holiday's name from Christmas to something more inclusive. But if they change the name, what will they call it? No one seems to know, just Anything BUT Christmas.

programme.desc: Exploring Arundel Castle and the history of the Earls of Arundel; how knights would have fought in the Hundred Years' War; how Arundel Castle would have prepared for Queen Victoria's visit in 1846.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.desc: Claire and Andrew Tavener were a sociable couple. But when Andrew drank, he became paranoid and possessive. So when he threatened to kill his 'cheating' wife, his friends wrote it off as the rambling of a drunk.

programme.desc: For Dog and Beth it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bass Man Standing
programme.desc: The Duck Commander team is invited to unveil a wing of the local Bass Pro shop that will feature their products.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dyeing his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The Tunnels of Gibraltar were a Second World War espionage base, hidden in the Rock of Gibraltar, which lay undiscovered for decades. At Atlas-1 Test Site, are the remains of an ingenious US Air Force project that continues to keep people safe.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: In the Scottish capital of Edinburgh, hidden from view, a series of vaults tell a murky story of opportunity, crime and destitution. At Fort Schwatka Unalaska are the remains of an Alaskan battleground.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An Appalachian dream that conjured the spirit of the old west, left to rot on a North Carolina mountainside. In the ex-Soviet republic of Georgia are the remains of an ingenious sky-high solution to a ground-based problem.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Explores a city in Azerbaijan that was razed to the ground in a conflict decided by a new weapon of war, a workhouse in Kansas City that appears to have been built for aristocracy, and two towns in Sicily that are seemingly deserted.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: May competes against a former rock’n’roll guitarist and band leader in the Silver Town Pokémon Contest for her second Kanto ribbon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Taking a break from Ash’s training regimen to do a little fishing, our heroes help a young woman keep the ownership of her family’s lake from a land developer.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: On their way to the Battle Pike, Ash and friends meet a supercharged Elekid who’s on a rampage, attacking everything in sight—including Max!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: As our heroes continue toward May’s next Pokémon Contest, Ash’s Grovyle finds itself nursing a crush on Nurse Joy’s Meganium!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children play a game called oranges and lemons. A bell appears in Teletubbyland and makes a lovely ringing noise. The noise is so loud it makes the Tubbies fall over laughing

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run up to see Debbie and some children singing some songs. A voice trumpet appears and plays a game with Po and Tinky Winky. It's called 'Two Little Teletubbies Sitting On A Hill."

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Devon couple take on more than they bargained for on an unloved hotel in France. Two sisters from Lincolnshire buy the diner they worked in as waitresses. And a couple from Kent hit the ground running when they buy a bed & breakfast.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash

programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 1
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Hyperactive Jet accidentally breaks the Dino Posse’s high-tech gem finder, just as it locates a new powerful gem, apparently embedded in some kind of household object. The team tries to come up with other high-tech methods of tracking the stone.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.desc: In Louisiana, a young man meets a mystery woman, then vanishes. In New Jersey, a teenage girl disappears walking home from school. In each case, a psychic saw everything.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: A California man finds his elderly neighbors murdered in their own home. In Ohio, police investigate a bloody attack but cannot find the victim. A pair of psychics join in to help.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: Video of an orb flying around the a room is captured at a Colorado mansion.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A scientist discovers footage on his security camera that even he can't explain; and a sailing ship from the 1800's is home to a ghostly crew.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell Feast
programme.desc: Melody is horrified that her sister, Amanda, is ruining her life by dating a 54 year old biker and loser named Wolf. Today they'll face off against Amanda's entire family!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Guess What? I'm Cheating
programme.desc: Done with her abusive relationship, Carla tells her boyfriend that she is cheating on him with his roommate. Then, Jay wants to tell Nikki she slept with her lover Crystal.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Shocking Secret Lovers
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next, Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
programme.desc: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her boyfriend Michael because he's allegedly violent. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson investigate the legend of a supernatural hound, a beast that may be stalking a young heir on the fog-shrouded moorland that makes up his estate.

programme.title: Sherlock: A Case of Evil
programme.desc: This tale focuses on the young 20-something Sherlock Holmes. Sherlock is in pursuit of the evil Moriarty and apparently shoots him to death, but his body cannot be found as he falls in a sewer.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman mistakenly has her ball switched for a real croquet ball that kills a Parliament member.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes urgently tries to find the location of a bomb that was placed somewhere in London.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Brian O'Casey explains his story of the sweepstakes ticket, and the urgency to find the lost ticket.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A challenge involving cooking five commonly served 'staple' dishes. Chef Ramsay makes changes to a dining service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final ten chefs are surprised when Ramsay brings in his daughter to celebrate her Sweet 16, each chef must create a worthy dish to be served at her party.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the chefs' next challenge, Chef Ramsay pits the teams against one another, preparing authentic Chinese dishes as prominent Chinese Chef Shirley Chung is brought in to judge their finished dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With the dining room transformed into an Italian bistro, all eight chefs learn that they will participate in the beloved blind taste test challenge, gelato edition. With two tables of 12 patrons, the chefs rush to see who finishes first.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs are called down to the dining room to discover two ice dancers performing a routine. Chef Ramsay explains ice dancing can be romantic, just as dessert can be. For their challenge they must cook an extraordinary dessert.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the first challenge, the final six chefs break through a case, retrieving a random ingredient they will have to cook with. The second challenge has each chef cooking with the same four ingredients. The third challenge is a surf and turf challenge.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Manor of Mystery
programme.desc: A Museum Director and a volunteer are fearful that an upcoming Victorian exhibit about the Victorian Era and Spiritualism will uncover and agitate entities from that time period.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 2
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 3
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 4
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 5
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: The Game: Got 99 Problems And My Chick Is One
programme.desc: After Melanie accepts a gift from Derwin, Jerome begins to question her commitment to their relationship.

programme.title: The Game: Baby Come Back
programme.desc: The new coach seems more interested in getting to know Kelly than with making a new deal with Jason.

programme.title: The Game: Baby On Board
programme.desc: Melanie finally confesses to Derwin that she is in love with him, but soon after, Derwin tells her about Janay's pregnancy.

programme.title: The Game: Mel-Odrama
programme.desc: Melanie has a confrontation with Janay when she thinks that Janay may be lying about her pregnancy with Derwin's baby.

programme.title: The Game: Just When I Thought I Was Out, She Pulls Me Back In
programme.desc: While Rick is ready to make their relationship public, Tasha refuses to do so and goes out of her way to keep it a secret from their co-workers.

programme.title: Moesha: Definitely Not The Cosbys
programme.desc: When Moesha tells her dad she’s engaged, he fantasizes about solving his family problems like Bill Cosby.

programme.title: Moesha: All This & Turkey Too
programme.desc: Q comes home for Thanksgiving and asks Moesha for his ring back.

programme.title: Moesha: The Player
programme.desc: Moesha’s attempt to solve Niecy’s 'ain’t gotta man blues' backfires.

programme.title: Moesha: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem reminisce about their friendship and wonder if it could be developing into something more.

programme.title: Moesha: Run, Mo, Run
programme.desc: An ex-con is after Moesha, and Dorian decides to search for his birth mother.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt2
programme.desc: Watch the second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation of a historic hall, where the paranormal activity includes the disembodied sounds of children laughing and crying and the apparition of a white lady.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads her team in a two-part investigation at the foreboding Gloucester Prison, one of Britain's most haunted places, known for its history of death, fear, pain, suicide, and incarceration

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation of the imposing and abandoned Gloucester Prison.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.desc: Krystina and Krystle are reunited, as Sarah is placed under private psychiatric care; Adam confesses his true identity to Blake and Alexis; following a visit to his mother's grave, Adam returns to Dana and pleas for her forgiveness.

programme.desc: Blake is stunned to learn that Clay may be Ben's son; Jackie's attempt to reunite Dominique and Garrett fail; Sarah accepts her baby's death after witnessing the gravesite; Clay tells Leslie of their possible blood ties.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Siege, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Matthew Blaisdel threatens to kill Blake to insure Krystle's cooperation; Alexis is saved from certain death by a mysterious and handsome stranger, unaware of their families horrifying experiences.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Kidnap
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is kidnapped and held for ransom until Barney, Casey, and Willy can steal an incriminating letter from a safe deposit box and turn it over to crime syndicate boss Andrew Metzger.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Crack-Up
programme.desc: Jim Phelps poses as a master chess champion to trap a criminal with a near-genius mentality and his mysterious boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Puppet
programme.desc: Roddy McDowall guest stars as Leo Ostro, a brilliant crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of the IMF when he launches a mysterious one-hundred-million-dollar scheme.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Incarnate
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gone in 20 Seconds
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get taken down by their fiercest opponent, CJ, but a twist of fate keeps the guys in the game. They uncover a Geiger counter and NASCAR impact wrenches, while their accountant delivers some shocking news.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro
programme.desc: Two fierce opponents best Ton and Allen at the auction, leaving the duo in the lurch with a "trash unit" and little chance of breaking even for the day. And Ton gets tazed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Voices of the Dead
programme.desc: Hear what true horror really sounds like when the dead speak to the living.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Family Phantoms
programme.desc: Meet the ghosts of a mother and aunt who make life difficult for the living.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Renos from Hell
programme.desc: Discover why a mansion was so cheap, and meet a spooky entity in a basement.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mysterious Vanishings
programme.desc: Mysterious Vanishings: Baffling stories of people who vanished without a trace, including a young Tasmanian pilot who is chased by unidentified aircraft before disappearing.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mind Control
programme.desc: Mind Control: Three spine-tingling stories, including a seance that turns a housewife into a literary genius as she channels a spirit to write a series of acclaimed books.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.

programme.desc: Angie hopes to become a foster mother and wants to make her house child-friendly.

programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.title: Murder Maps: Notting Hill Horror Part 1
programme.desc: John Christie brought death to everyone around him. He managed to pin his terrible crimes on another man who would be sentenced to death. He eluded capture for years.

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Fall of Constantinople

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Aral, a Sea for Cotton
programme.desc: In the 1960s, the Aral Sea, lying astride Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan, is the fourth largest lake in the world.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Cortes and the End of the Aztec Empire

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Alexander Becomes Great

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Arthur: The Perfect Game/D.W.'s Furry Freakout
programme.desc: Francine is excited about a school project, but she's so obsessed with making it perfect that she can't seem to get anything done at all. When D.W. finds a stray kitten, it soon turns out to be a lot more than D.W. can handle.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Time Trouble/Buster's Amish Mismatch
programme.desc: D.W. is tired of being bossed around all the time and demands to know why she couldn't have been born before Arthur! And during a trip to Amish country, Buster becomes enamored with the simple life and vows to forgo modern conveniences.

programme.title: Arthur: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune
programme.desc: During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies
programme.desc: The latest book about everyone's favorite boy wizard--Henry Skreever--is finally out! Every kid in town is lining up to get it, except Prunella, who's ordered a limited edition from England. Ever wonder what Baby Kate and Pal are thinking?

programme.title: Arthur: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur
programme.desc: An army of lice has descended on the heads of Lakewood Elementary. Who or what is strong enough to defeat them? What if you could be Arthur for a day? View Arthur's life through his very own eyes for this special episode.

programme.title: Arthur: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears
programme.desc: The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland
programme.desc: Buster receives a box of chocolates in the mail from a secret admirer. It's driving him crazy! Who could possibly like him that much? And James receives a gift from his uncle in Scotland--a toy lamb that will give its owner special powers!

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One
programme.desc: Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?

programme.title: Arthur: Double Tibble Trouble/Arthur's Almost Live Not Real Music Festival
programme.desc: Playing with the Tibble twins requires preparation, endurance and earplugs. But when one gets sick, playing with the other should be a lot easier, right? Arthur and the gang create their own music videos.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: World War II aircraft included iconic planes like the Japanese Zero, American F4U Corsair, and the Grumman F6F Hellcat, engaging in intense dogfights and strategic bombing campaigns across vast expanses of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Kokoda Track in World War II was a treacherous mountainous trail in Papua New Guinea, where intense jungle warfare unfolded between Australian and Japanese forces during the Kokoda Track campaign, marking a crucial phase in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gilbert Islands in WW II was a pivotal amphibious assault by the U.S. against heavily fortified Japanese positions, resulting in intense, costly fighting and ultimately securing a crucial step in the Central Pacific island strategy.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Marshall Islands were strategically significant in World War II as their capture by the United States provided forward bases for airfields and naval operations, facilitating the Allied island-hopping campaign towards Japan in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: Battle of Guadalcanal in WW II was a fiercely contested six-month-long campaign between Allied and Japanese forces, primarily fought on land, sea, and air around the Solomon Islands.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Peleliu in World War II was a grueling amphibious assault by U.S. forces against heavily fortified Japanese positions on the Pacific island, lasting from September to November 1944 and resulting in significant casualties on both sides.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The fighting on Iwo Jima in WW II involved intense and brutal combat between U.S. Marines and entrenched Japanese forces on a strategically crucial volcanic island in the Pacific.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Okinawa in WW II was a fierce and prolonged amphibious assault by Allied forces against well-defended Japanese positions on the island, marking the largest and bloodiest battle in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Lancaster: Britain’s Frontline Bomber
programme.desc: The Avro Lancaster is the legendary British heavy bomber that carved its place in history with Bomber Command during World War 2. That conflict saw over seven thousand of these iconic aircraft come off the production line.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: Skyraider: The many variants of this single piston engine fighter bomber helped dominate the air to ground attack role in Vietnam, earning quite a reputation.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: February, 1943, a B-25 Mitchell Bomber crashes into Sharp Top Mountain. It was the third training crash in the area that night. What really caused this accident?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Sue Holderness and John Challis bargain hunt with Charles Hanson and Philip Serrell in Essex for auction in Kent. Can John outsmart his TV wife or will Sue win big? Hopefully, both teams will do well as all profits go to Children in Need.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik and Ryan are joined by Steve Gold, a former fashion model who has become a successful agent, specializing in luxury properties; Ryan hopes to sell 50 houses in three months; a newly calm Fredrik meets a Tribeca seller who won't negotiate.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lands a building with $400 million dollars in potential sales, but his boss thinks he may have over-promised in order to get it; Ryan juggles two sellers; Steve gets a list of demands from a broker and makes one of his own.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.desc: After a radio transmitter causes strange sonic disturbances, Mona suspects that the town's polarity has been altered. // Mona suspects that Charley's new soccer coach is actually a Sasquatch bent on eating the soccer players.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A model seduces the town into joining her new trendy tanning club. // When a heat wave brings on a drought, Mona discovers a mysterious serpent creature living in the shallow river that flows through town.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Uptown Girls: Uptown Girls (2003)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: Company K

programme.title: Hercules and the Captive Women

programme.title: The Spy Gone North

programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.title: SpaceWalker

programme.title: Battle Beyond the Sun

programme.title: Timber Kings: Truck Overboard
programme.desc: Joel wrecks an 18-wheeler during a winter build in Ontario, Beat and André sell a thousand year old tree to an eccentric Arkansas millionaire.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Beat’s Arkansas house build is in trouble when delivery trucks arrive out of order, Bryan Jr. remodels a local bar for a penny-pinching friend, and Peter turns inventor to solve a work yard problem.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Heir Apparent
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. takes his son to Missouri and they manage to assemble a house despite themselves, Beat builds a Western-style saloon for a meatball millionaire and his racecar-driving girlfriend.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Hard Hat & Home
programme.desc: Beat delivers a home in Utah to a frugal client who wants to do everything for himself, André and Joel build competing chicken coop mansions, while André covets a magazine cover story.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Jolly Ole Island
programme.desc: Joel assembles a millionaire’s retreat on a private island in England, Beat gets an emotional assignment, and Peter cannot take a vacation until he completes an HQ remodel for The Chief’s return.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Peter in a Pickle
programme.desc: Peter goes to Scotland and discovers that his boss Bryan Sr. has followed, Beat and André face a client with buyer’s remorse, while Joel agrees to build an elaborate doghouse and birdhouse, all for a slice of cake.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Big Plot
programme.desc: Found among the wreckage of a crashed plane are parts of an atomic bomb and Peter uncovers a plot to start a Third World War.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Secret Experiment
programme.desc: After a freak accident while conducting a secret experiment with light refraction, Dr. Peter Brady is transformed into an invisible man.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 5
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 6
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 7
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 8
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 9
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Moesha: Run, Mo, Run
programme.desc: An ex-con is after Moesha, and Dorian decides to search for his birth mother.

programme.title: Moesha: Mom
programme.desc: Dorian finds his mom, but it’s Moesha who ends up getting hurt.

programme.title: Moesha: That's My Moma
programme.desc: Dorian thought finding his mom would provide answers, not raise more questions (Lil Bow Wow guest stars).

programme.title: Moesha: What If...
programme.desc: Niecy spins a fantasy about what Moesha’s life would be like if her mom raised her instead of Frank.

programme.title: Moesha: Scary Marriage
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are matched up in a mock marriage for a homework assignment.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Forbidden Fruit Episode
programme.desc: After a long dating dry spell, Phyllis reveals that she has a new man, Earl, who seems almost too perfect, but when Dee Dee discovers that Earl is married, Phyllis confesses that she already knew and must decide whether to do the right thing or her thing.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Butting In Episode
programme.desc: Encouraging her mother Phyllis to get back out in the dating scene, Mona gets more than she bargained for when Phyllis decides to join Mona’s social circle and to make matters worse, Mona discovers that her mom is better at meeting men than she is.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Foot In My Mouth Episode
programme.desc: When Mona discovers a potential new talent Zora (guest star Tamyra Gray), she gets more than she bargains for when Zora makes a move on her.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big College Admission Episode
programme.desc: After years of claiming to be nothing more than friends, Spencer and Mona are shocked when Spencer’s cousin Chauncey is hired at Delicious Records and recalls the night in college when he caught Mona and Spencer having drunken sex

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Bitter Baby Shower Episode
programme.desc: Big Dee Dee’s baby shower turns cold when Mona feels her confidence has been betrayed after learning that Dee Dee has told her cousin Barbara (guest star Shari Headley) that Mona’s relationship problems stem from her mother’s bitterness

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads team in a violent, secret investigation. Place's name and location concealed due to extreme haunting. Little history, aggressive entities a mystery. Can they reveal the darkness and face the unknown?

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: Yvette and the Most Haunted team are invited to the inner sanctum of the Freemasons to investigate the many ghost sightings at Clifton Hall. Even before the investigation starts the team are faced with some of strange phenomena witnessed by others.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Prophecy, Couch Potato, Love Over the Counter, Imaginary Friend, Last Man on Earth.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: House of Shadows, One Hand in the Till, Teasdale's Motor Car, The Vision and the Grave.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wreath, Terror Night, Tants, The Candidate, The Ring.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Candlestick, The Diner, From the Agency, The Magic Rose Garden, The Jeep.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Kirby, Dust, Malibu Cop, A Joyful Noise, The Hooded Chair.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Siege, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Matthew Blaisdel threatens to kill Blake to insure Krystle's cooperation; Alexis is saved from certain death by a mysterious and handsome stranger, unaware of their families horrifying experiences.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Siege, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Dex is rushed to the hospital while a search party scrambles to locate the missing Carringtons, who are being held captive in a bunkhouse. Fear of the deranged Matthew forces Krystle to pretend that she still has feelings for him.\

programme.title: Dynasty: The Aftermath
programme.desc: The incident in the bunkhouse leaves Steven emotionally scarred. The police urge him to seek psychiatric help to deal with the trauma. Jeff and Fallon's unexpected homecoming helps everyone to put the tragedy behind them.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Announcement
programme.desc: Steven turns down Blake's request to be his campaign manager; Adam is stunned by Dana's inability to bear children; Alexis and Sean Rowan share and intimate afternoon; Blake announces his bid for governor of Colorado, as Alexis plots his downfall.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Surrogate, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Sean accepts Alexis' job offer, immediately putting him at odds with Adam; Dana is tortured by a secret from the past explaining her inability to have children; Jeff and Fallon continue to grow farther apart.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Incarnate
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Boomerang
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Question
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Fountain
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Fighter
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Speed
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Renos from Hell
programme.desc: Discover why a mansion was so cheap, and meet a spooky entity in a basement.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Evil Intentions
programme.desc: Visit a haunted tattoo shop and witness a supernatural family reunion.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing In Evil
programme.desc: Meet a couple who invite spirits into their home through their nursery.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Kids Under Attack
programme.desc: Watch a boy encounter a terrifying being, and an imaginary friend turns evil.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Dream Home Nightmares
programme.desc: Visit a haunted inn and a dream home that turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Face to Face With Evil
programme.desc: Watch a woman battle a predatory ghost, and see a couple’s shocking discovery.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil
programme.desc: A shadowy presence manifests from the darkened corners of Judy McCarthy’s Texas home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Lair
programme.desc: For years, the Cranmer family thought their historic Pittsburgh dream home was haunted by a harmless ghost. But, when the activity grows violent, they fight back with the only weapon they have, prayer; culminating with an exorcism of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat: Residents of a Texas town report strange lights in the night sky.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies: A look at a mysterious medieval manuscript and Egyptian mummies containing cocaine from Peru.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength: A look at dolphin rescues, death-smelling pets and a skinny teen with unbelievable strength.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner: A look at Death Valley boulders, mysterious dancing lights and super-marathon runners.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Yvette takes Karl, Stuart and Mary into the vast Shrewsbury Prison. A place riddled with paranormal activity of every kind.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Charlton House
programme.desc: Karl investigates Carlton house library for the first time and quickly realises that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl enters Borwick Hall for the first time as he investigates the upper floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P2
programme.desc: Our investigation into Borwick Hall continues as Stuart investigates the middle floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the outbuildings of this large estate, where many people have witnessed strange occurrences, some he is about to witness first-hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House P2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house alone, although it isn’t long before he feels something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette takes Glen and Mary into the incredibly haunted Bishton Hall. They start in the upper floors and work their way down to the cellars, but is something following them.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker
programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario
programme.desc: She became a household name at just 14years old, when she burst onto our screens in the groundbreaking series Skins. Since then, she’s pursued her acting dreams all the way to Hollywood — and built quite an impressive career.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.
