programme.title: Twister Chasers
programme.desc: Take a wild ride with tornado chasers as they traverse the American Midwest.

programme.title: Avalanche: Man Versus Earth
programme.desc: Tumbling snow can be a massively destructive force. With new science, can we gain the advantage to control it?

programme.title: Our World is on Fire
programme.desc: Climate change is now a crisis, and our world is crying out. Examine some possible remedies to the emergency.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Kane’s irritation with all things modern has left him pining for the good ol’ days when everything was made of rock. And when something as simple as mashing potatoes becomes a complicated mess he finally snaps and takes off for some ‘alone time’.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Under VRAINS
programme.desc: Ghost Gal ventures into the vast underbelly of LINK VRAINS and uncovers a sinister secret the Hanoi have been hiding!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Piece of the Puzzle
programme.desc: Zaizen has the upper hand, but Playmaker’s looking to make one last play to take him down!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: A Weave Emissary named Iyori is being pursued by Core Drushes. As she gets closer to Vash Naroom, Edyn, Tony, and Strag come to her aid and defeat the attacking creatures.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Gore’s looking to suplex Playmaker into submission, but Playmaker’s not about to tap out!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rescue
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Ruin
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee.T / The Great Tiki Hunt
programme.desc: McGee befriends a frog-like alien creature that crash lands close by Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder & Splintered
programme.desc: Shredder lures Splinter into the Technodrome, this time with the promise that a weapon in his possession can restore the sensei to human form.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Shredder
programme.desc: Shredder trains students at the Dojo for a crooked Turtles gang. The mock turtles' crime spree starts turning the public against Michelangelo, Raphael, Donatello and Leonardo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Incredible Shrinking Turtles
programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): It Came from Beneath the Sewers
programme.desc: In the second of a four-parter about the pursuit of the Eye of Sarnoth, the Turtles are attacked by a huge alien plant that is making New York into a jungle.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mean Machines
programme.desc: The hunt for the Eye of Sarnoth continues in the third of a four-parter with the Turtles in Groucho-like disguises. Shredder hooks up a fragment of the Eye to the computer Omnus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku starts having trouble controlling his body and energy! After visiting with King Kai, he learns he's on strict bed rest until his energy levels out.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Trunks and Goten arrive at Fortoto Castle aboard a delivery spaceship and meet Potage there. However, Trunks and his companions engage in a fight related to the Superhuman Water and receive unexpected reinforcements.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: While rescuing Trunks and companions from the Superhuman Water, Vegeta's power is absorbed. Gotenks then confronts the cloned Vegeta to restore him.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku fights Vegeta's copy while the true Vegeta becomes more transparent by the minute. Trunks, Goten, Potage and Jaco scramble to destroy Commeson's core to help Goku gain an advantage.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: After mistakenly attacking Goku, Trunks reintroduces himself and explains the threat to his timeline; Goku and Trunks spar to get a sense of each other's power levels.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Hairadee arrives seeking vengeance against Skyress, sparking a fierce battle. Shun and Komba are transported to a desolate castle, preventing their interference, whilst Harpus is destroyed.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: The situation looks grim for Wavern and the Infinity Core. They have taken refuge atop Wardington Tower, but Naga and his forces are closing in.

programme.title: Bakugan

programme.title: Bakugan

programme.desc: While working in a fast food restaurant for Career's Week, the kids uncover an alien plot to enslave the whole town// When the old school bus is brought back into action George gets a very rough ride from the ghost inhabiting it.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A flu epidemic hits the school. Mona makes the connection between the spreading flu and alien abductions. // When bad luck seems to be everywhere, Mona discovers that a vengeful postman has created the ultimate chain letter.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mr. Hyde, who runs the town'S ice cream and coffee shop, is being run out of business by a slick competitor, the charismatic Dr. Java. // A strict librarian reprimands Mona for returning a late book for her book report.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona, Charley and Lily become alarmed when there's a local garter snake population explosion // The new weatherman Jonathan Jupiter is able to flawlessly predict the weather

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Potato plants spliced with jellyfish bring out a hybrid creature called Potato Fish who make people relax into a dull stupor // Mona discovers that the mysterious aunt staying with her family is really a Black Widow Spider.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: A rock giant awakens in the old quarry, threatening to crush the town. // The trio attend a disappointing Space Camp run by a real astronaut, Sparky Nickerson.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and Charley beam a message via satellite to extraterrestrials across the universe // Mona's attempts to ward off an imminent invasion by red moon monsters are stymied by the new next-door-neighbor

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mr. Hyde restores an antique ice cream sign of a giant-sized Freddy Frosty that was found in the town dump Mona // Charley's sudden interest in being a musician lands him in a rock band

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's father takes on a new job and wears a strange old suit that seems to alter his personality for the worst. // When valuables go missing in the house, Mona discovers a family of trolls living in her basement.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: True Colors/Recycled Koopa
programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie
programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Mirrors
